_meta.description: English intent patterns for Excel/XLSX editing operations.

clarifyIfMissing.ask_en: What value should I fill in?

positive: In SUMMARY 1!D35:D48, set every cell to 0
Set all cells in B2:B50 to blank
Change every cell in the range to 100
Change text numbers to actual numbers in A1:A50
Set formula =SUM(A1:A5) in the range C1:C20
Fill down from A1 to A100
Fill right from A1 to E1
Apply bold to the header row
Make the text red in A1:A10
Set font color to green for the selection
Change font to Arial in A1:A10
Use Times New Roman for the header

positive: Apply date format to the range
Filter by column A equals Sales

Make this a table with headers

Update the chart type to line
Move the legend to the bottom
Add a heat map to the range
Add data bars to the selection
Create a dropdown list in B2
Add a dropdown with Yes, No, Maybe
Add a row after the header
Add a new sheet called Summary

positive: Add up the values in the selection

If any cell is blank in D35:D48, fill it with 0
Generate a series from January to December
Change the chart data series to B1:B50
Update chart series from column C
Add series from D1:D20 to the chart
